settings.title: Bots
settings.subtitle: Create and manage the bots you are responsible for

admin.title: Bots
admin.subtitle: Inspect and manage bots across this server

unavailable.owner: You do not have permission to create or manage bots on this server.

empty.title: No bots yet
empty.owner: Twórz własne integracje API za pomocą kont botów.
empty.admin: No manageable bot accounts were found.

placeholder.description: Explain what this bot does and how it handles conversation data.

help.username: Bot usernames must end in _bot so they remain recognisable everywhere.
help.description: People will use this disclosure to decide whether to interact with the bot.

credentials.title: {bot} API key
credentials.active_description: This bot currently has an API key.
credentials.none_description: This bot does not currently have an API key.
credentials.show_once: Copy this key now. Chatto will not show it again.
credentials.generate_confirm_body: The new secret will be shown once after it is generated.
credentials.rotate_confirm_body: The current key will stop working immediately. The replacement secret will be shown once.
credentials.revoke_confirm_body: The bot will immediately lose API access until its owner generates another key.
credentials.copy_failed: Could not copy the API key.

dialog.description: Bots are visible automation accounts. Clearly identify their purpose and data handling.
